query: SELECT da.*, i.email as invite_email, u.email as user_email FROM drill_assignments da LEFT JOIN invites i ON da.invite_id = i.id LEFT JOIN users u ON da.user_id = u.id ORDER BY da.created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
